message:
cli: Support multiple environments with --dev flag

- Refactor config to store multiple environments (dev/prod)
- Add --dev flag to login/logout commands
- Store credentials separately per environment in keychain
- Remove env-config.ts in favor of runtime environment selection
- Update status command to show all logged-in environments

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/6b19a365-edc3-4114-963c-71f6502c9c12

files.patch:
@@ -1,20 +0,0 @@
-/**
- * Build-time configuration constants
- * These are replaced at build time using bun build --define
- */
-
-/**
- * Current environment (development or production)
- * Inlined at build time, defaults to development
- */
-export const NODE_ENV = process.env.NODE_ENV ?? "development";
-
-/**
- * Check if running in production environment
- */
-export const isProduction = NODE_ENV === "production";
-
-/**
- * Check if running in development environment
- */
-export const isDevelopment = NODE_ENV === "development";
